betting-analysis: Four agents run in parallel on every game. Each produces an independent signal score that feeds into the consensus pipeline. Combined weight: 70% of the final pick decision.
betting-pipeline: Sequential processing stage. ML model consumes all parallel agent outputs as features, Consensus aggregates with ±15% caps, Narrative generates the human-readable explanation.
betting-monitoring: Always-on daemons that keep data fresh between analysis runs. Injury changes trigger re-analysis. Line snapshots build the historical data that LineMovementAgent needs.
betting-orchestration: Single coordinator that manages the full pipeline lifecycle — context loading, parallel dispatch, sequential chaining, and database persistence.
betting-output: Final stage — converts AI picks into distributable content (bet slip images, tweet drafts) for social media and the Nimrod scheduler.
betting-resolution: Two-pass resolve system ensures all games get settled. Evening pass catches most results, late-night pass handles West Coast and overtime games. Feeds results back into ML training.
betting-refresh: Data ingestion layer — keeps the pipeline fed with fresh odds, games, rankings, and news throughout the day.
betting-content: Content generation triggered on a schedule — bet slip images and tweet drafts prepared for distribution.
betting-maintenance: Infrastructure health — database backups and agent process monitoring.
openclaw-henchmen: Full multi-platform betting pipeline. Picks delivery → bet slip images → Moltbook publishing → results recap. 10 of 15 cron jobs handle the complete betting lifecycle across Discord, Telegram, and Moltbook. ML-filtered pick selection, browser automation for logging, and 500-pick analysis feedback loop.
openclaw-briefings: Daily Discord digests — morning preview of today's action with Flask health check, evening recap of results with P/L and anomaly alerts.
openclaw-intelligence: Weekly competitive intelligence. Monitors Bortlesboat's GitHub activity, MCP registry, and new tool releases every Monday morning.
openclaw-fishing: Jacksonville ICW fishing intelligence delivered to Discord at 5 AM daily. Pulls live NOAA conditions, solunar feeding windows, tide predictions, and NWS forecast. Scores 9 spots and 10 species against real-time data.
openclaw-moltbook: HenchmenAI social presence on Moltbook. Daily picks to 3 subreddits (m/edges, m/sportsbetting, m/predictions), results recaps, and notification monitoring 4x/day. Full autonomous community engagement.
icc-scanners: Five parallel stock/fund scanners running on yfinance data. Dividend stalwarts (44 stocks + 6 ETFs), emerging tech (40+ stocks), hidden gems (15 small/mid-caps), mutual funds (12 top funds), HYSA alternatives (10 money market ETFs). Each uses composite multi-factor scoring.
icc-models: Quantitative finance engines. Monte Carlo (10k stochastic paths with percentile projections), Markowitz efficient frontier optimizer (max Sharpe + min volatility), Gordon Growth Model for dividend valuation, and comprehensive risk metrics (Sharpe, Sortino, VaR, CVaR, drawdown).
icc-advisor: Proactive recommendation pipeline. Financial health scorer (5-factor composite) determines strategy → parallel scanners run → owned tickers filtered out → top 8 picks ranked with contextual reasoning. 30-min cache TTL.
icc-monitoring: Portfolio health monitoring — concentration risk detection (>25-40% single holding), diversification gaps, sector allocation review, and rebalancing recommendations. Scored 0-100 with severity levels.
betting-discord: Discord integration layer for betting-analyzer. Admin command listener polls every 30s for approve/deny/trigger nimrod commands. Picks poster sends rich embeds with bet slip images and confidence scores. Rate-limited alerts channel for injury changes and line movements.
